description:
In this episode of Better Human Better Dog, I help two dogs facing very different challenges — an overweight Pitbull mix struggling to survive and a territorial miniature poodle controlling his apartment balcony. But both cases reveal the same truth: love without structure is not enough.
Moose, an obese rescue Pitbull, can barely walk, breathe, or enjoy life. His family loves him deeply, but he needs more than affection. Through structured exercise, swimming, controlled feeding, and calm leaders
title: This Pitbull Could Barely Walk Anymore | Better Human Better Dog | S04E07
